task_completion.description: Verify the DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT view was created successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SQL client (like DBeaver, SQL Developer, or sqlplus) showing a successful execution message for 'CREATE VIEW DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT' or the view appearing in the database schema navigator.

task_completion.description: Verify the QUARTERLY_SPENDING_PIVOT view was created successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SQL client showing a successful execution message for 'CREATE VIEW QUARTERLY_SPENDING_PIVOT' or the view appearing in the database schema navigator.

task_completion.description: Verify the ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED view was created successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a SQL client showing a successful execution message for 'CREATE VIEW ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED' or the view appearing in the database schema navigator.

task_completion.description: Verify dept_job_salary_pivot.csv was exported to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'dept_job_salary_pivot.csv' visible on the Desktop GUI, in a file manager open to /home/ga/Desktop, or in a terminal listing of the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Verify quarterly_spending_report.csv was exported to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'quarterly_spending_report.csv' visible on the Desktop GUI, in a file manager open to /home/ga/Desktop, or in a terminal listing of the Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Verify annual_costs_normalized.csv was exported to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'annual_costs_normalized.csv' visible on the Desktop GUI, in a file manager open to /home/ga/Desktop, or in a terminal listing of the Desktop directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Oracle database to create the views.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a genuine database client (e.g., DBeaver, sqlplus) was used to connect to localhost:1521/XEPDB1 as the 'hr' user, rather than just typing text into a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used PIVOT and UNPIVOT SQL operators as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look at the SQL queries executed by the agent. They must contain the 'PIVOT' and 'UNPIVOT' keywords rather than manually hardcoding the aggregated data or using basic CASE WHEN statements.

integrity.description: Ensure the CSV files were generated from the database query results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of an export action from the database client (e.g., right-clicking results and selecting 'Export', or using a spool/export command) rather than manually creating a text file and typing out fake CSV data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three specific views: DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT, QUARTERLY_SPENDING_PIVOT, and ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED. The DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT view must pivot data for jobs: IT_PROG, SA_REP, FI_ACCOUNT, ST_CLERK, SH_CLERK, and SA_MAN. The ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED view must unpivot the categories: SALARY, BENEFITS, EQUIPMENT, and TRAINING. The results must be exported to three exact files on the Desktop: /home/ga/Desktop/dept_job_salary_pivot.csv, /home/ga/Desktop/quarterly_spending_report.csv, and /home/ga/Desktop/annual_costs_normalized.csv.
